info.name: Grocery API
info.description: Complete Grocery Laravel API collection. Set `base_url` (e.g. http://localhost:8000) and `token` from login/register response. Protected routes use Bearer auth.

exec: console.log('Saved bearer token to collection/environment variables.');
console.log('Saved bearer token to collection/environment variables.');

request.description: Permanently delete the authenticated user account and related data.
Download a JSON export of profile, addresses, recent orders, and notification preferences. Returns application/json file download (not wrapped in success/data envelope).
Get the authenticated user app language preference (en|ar).
Get notification toggles for settings page (order_updates, promotion_emails, nutrition_insights, price_alerts).
Get loyalty points, membership tier, benefits, and active coupons.
